name: SEMrush
description: SEO content generation powered by SEMrush keyword intelligence. Extracts high-value keywords from SEMrush's research API and uses them to build optimized meta titles and descriptions with strategic keyword placement.
author: Spwig

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: Your SEMrush API key. Found in your account under Subscription Info > API units.

database.label: Regional Database
database.help_text: Select the regional database that best matches your target market. This determines which keyword data is used for SEO optimization.

pricing.note: SEMrush uses API units. Each keyword request consumes units based on the report type and data volume. 10,000 units included by default.

es.meta.name: SEMrush
es.meta.description: Generacion SEO con inteligencia de palabras clave de SEMrush
es.setup.title: Configurar SEMrush
es.setup.step1_desc: Registrese en SEMrush para obtener acceso a la API.
es.setup.step2_desc: En su cuenta, vaya a Informacion de suscripcion > Unidades API.
es.setup.step3_desc: Elija la base de datos que mejor se ajuste a su mercado objetivo.

fr.meta.name: SEMrush
fr.meta.description: Generation SEO avec l'intelligence de mots-cles SEMrush
fr.setup.title: Configurer SEMrush
fr.setup.step1_desc: Inscrivez-vous sur SEMrush pour acceder a l'API.
fr.setup.step2_desc: Dans votre compte, allez dans Infos d'abonnement > Unites API.
fr.setup.step3_title: Selectionner la base de donnees regionale
fr.setup.step3_desc: Choisissez la base de donnees correspondant a votre marche cible.

de.meta.name: SEMrush
de.setup.title: SEMrush einrichten
de.setup.step1_desc: Registrieren Sie sich bei SEMrush fur den API-Zugang.
de.setup.step2_desc: In Ihrem Konto unter Abo-Informationen > API-Einheiten.
de.setup.step3_desc: Wahlen Sie die Datenbank, die am besten zu Ihrem Zielmarkt passt.

changes: Keyword research via SEMrush Related Keywords API
Keyword-driven meta title and description templates
